title: Preterite vs imperfect in real stories
subtitle: Choose event or background with confidence.
overview: A2 storytelling needs both tenses working together.
Use imperfect for scene, preterite for event.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: It was late when I left.
I was tired, but I finished.
I was hungry, so I cooked.
It was raining when we arrived.

items.es: Estaba caminando por el centro cuando empezó a llover.
items.en: I was walking downtown when it started to rain.

items.es: El restaurante estaba lleno, pero encontramos una mesa.
items.en: The restaurant was full, but we found a table.

items.es: Tenía prisa, así que tomé un taxi.
items.en: I was in a hurry, so I took a taxi.

items.es: Era mi primera vez en Madrid y me perdí.
items.en: It was my first time in Madrid and I got lost.

items.es: Cuando llegué a casa, mi familia estaba cenando.
items.en: When I arrived home, my family was having dinner.
